title: rubus enanthophorus
intro: Rubus enanthophorus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus enanthophorus are attributed to its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
